title: We Live Again
writer: Lev Tolstoy, Leonard Praskins, Thornton Wilder
actors: Anna Sten, Fredric March, Jane Baxter
plot: Nekhlyudov, a Russian nobleman serving on a jury, discovers that the young girl on trial, Katusha, is someone he once seduced and abandoned and that he himself bears responsibility for reducing her to crime. He sets out to redeem ...
